Start sglang with --grammar-backend ananke, run ananke generate with --backend sglang, verify constraint_spec arrives, domains activate, and generated code is syntactically valid.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"rand.arete@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-01T12:59:29Z","created_by":"Rand Arete","updated_at":"2026-03-01T12:59:29Z"}

new_value: E2E verified: Python pubsub (49 constraints, 5 domains), Rust state machine (57 constraints, 3 domains), Zig error union (22 constraints, semantic constraints). OpenAI-compatible v1/chat/completions endpoint deployed to Modal.

old_value: {"id":"ananke-w0e","title":"Language support precision and quality improvements","description":"Cross-cutting foundation + per-language precision improvements for all 14 supported languages. Three systemic gaps: pattern matching has no context awareness (matches inside comments/strings), type system covers only 10/14 languages, all extractors are line-by-line missing multi-line constructs.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","owner":"rand.arete@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:42:45Z","created_by":"Rand Arete","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:42:45Z"}

{"id":"ananke-1lb","title":"Comment/string-aware pattern matching (Phase 1A)","description":"Add lightweight lexer state machine to findPatternMatches (src/clew/patterns.zig:2541) that tracks whether current byte position is inside a comment or string literal. Skip pattern matching in non-code contexts. Per-language delimiter config for line comments (// vs #), block comments (/* */ vs \"\"\" \"\"\"), and string delimiters (\", ', `, r\", \"\"\"). ~150 lines.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"rand.arete@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:42:53Z","created_by":"Rand Arete","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:42:53Z"}

new_value: Comment/string-aware pattern matching implemented with lexer state machine in findPatternMatches. 4 tests added. All 473 tests pass.

Add addCEdges, addRubyEdges, addPhpEdges, addSwiftEdges in inhabitation.zig. ~200 lines across 3 files.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"rand.arete@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:43:01Z","created_by":"Rand Arete","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:43:01Z"}

new_value: Added C, Ruby, PHP, Swift to Language enum with TypeSyntax, canonicalName, primitive lists, parser functions, and inhabitation edges. All 473 tests pass.

old_value: {"id":"ananke-8if","title":"Add tests for Tier 1 extractors (Phase 1B)","description":"All 9 Tier 1 extractors (rust, java, python, typescript, javascript, go, c, cpp, zig_lang) have zero inline tests. Add 6-8 tests each following the Tier 2 pattern (kotlin.zig line 247+): function decl, complex return type, struct/class/type definition, import, async (where applicable), error handling detection, false positive guard (keyword in comment). ~400 lines across 9 files.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","owner":"rand.arete@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-02T18:42:57Z","created_by":"Rand Arete","updated_at":"2026-03-02T18:42:57Z"}
